basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 Senior Research Fellow vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age for Senior Research Fellow: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science, Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national level examinations, 2 years research experience
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC, NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. Experience: 2 years of research experience. Desirable: Hands-on-experience in genetic and molecular techniques, Experience of Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) techniques/handling of high-throughput sequencing platforms, Capability and experience of handling microbiome and metabolome data, Knowledge and proficiency in programming languages, Multi-tasking personality, Good manuscript writing skills and computer literacy

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow: Rs 42,000 + 27% HRA (As per DBT guidelines)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science, Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national level examinations, 2 years research experience

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC, NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. Experience: 2 years of research experience. Desirable: Hands-on-experience in genetic and molecular techniques, Experience of Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) techniques/handling of high-throughput sequencing platforms, Capability and experience of handling microbiome and metabolome data, Knowledge and proficiency in programming languages, Multi-tasking personality, Good manuscript writing skills and computer literacy

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age for Senior Research Fellow: 35 years

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow: Rs 42,000 + 27% HRA (As per DBT guidelines)

rows.event: Last date for applying for posts

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Senior Research Fellow post at AIIMS Delhi is 16 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Research Fellow post in the AIIMS Delhi recruitment drive. This offers a focused opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Senior Research Fellow post at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Fellow post will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 + 27% HRA per month, as per DBT guidelines. This is a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Senior Research Fellow post must not exceed 35 years of age. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment. This makes it accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Senior Research Fellow posts at AIIMS Delhi is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key qualifications required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Applicants should have a Postgraduate degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests, along with 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview or virtual interview. Final selection will be based on performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job location for the Senior Research Fellow position is New Delhi, Delhi. Selected candidates will be working at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow post if I am a fresh graduate?
faq.answer: No, candidates require 2 years of research experience in addition to their postgraduate or professional degree to be eligible for the Senior Research Fellow post. Fresh graduates may not meet this experience criterion.
